title: About Me
text:
Hello, I’m Saori Kikuchi.
I am a data science student with a strong interest in machine learning, analytics, and problem solving.
My goal is to build practical data-driven solutions that help organizations make better decisions. I enjoy working on projects involving data analysis, predictive modeling, and visualization.
I am currently developing my portfolio to showcase academic and personal projects relevant to data and technology roles.
